programme.title: Fight or Flight
programme.desc: A mercenary takes on the job of tracking a high-value asset known only as "The Ghost" on an international flight. Realizing the plane is filled with assassins assigned to kill them both, the pair must work together in a fight for their lives.

programme.title: Old Guy
programme.desc: An aging hit man must train a young prodigy when his employer moves to replace the old guard. However, when they learn they're being betrayed, the unlikely pair turns into a lethal team -- with their double-crossing bosses in their sights.

programme.title: The Corrupted
programme.desc: Released from prison, a talented boxer wants nothing more than to reconnect with his young son and live a quiet life. But when his brother gets on the wrong side of a shady developer, he must risk everything to save his sibling before it's too late.

programme.title: Buddymoon
programme.desc: After he is dumped at the altar, a former child star's best friend takes him on a backpacking trek in the remote mountains of Oregon.

programme.title: Slingshot
programme.desc: An astronaut struggles to maintain his grip on reality during a possibly compromised mission to Saturn's moon, Titan.

programme.title: Memory
programme.desc: Social worker Sylvia's structured life is blown apart when Saul follows her home from their high school reunion. Their surprise encounter profoundly impacts both of them as they open the door to the past.

programme.title: The Kings of Summer
programme.desc: Three teenagers (Nick Robinson, Gabriel Basso, Moises Arias) carry out a plan to leave their dysfunctional parents, build a house in the woods and live off the land.

programme.title: The Comeback Trail
programme.desc: Indebted to a mobster, a desperate producer tries to "accidentally" kill an aging movie star for an insurance scam. However, he soon begins to realize that the film they're shooting is a masterpiece in the making.

programme.title: The Godfather
programme.desc: Widely regarded as one of the greatest films of all time, this mob drama, based on Mario Puzo's novel of the same name, focuses on the powerful Italian-American crime family of Don Vito Corleone (Marlon Brando). When the don's youngest son, Michael (Al Pacino), reluctantly joins the Mafia, he becomes involved in the inevitable cycle of violence and betrayal. Although Michael tries to maintain a no

programme.title: The Godfather, Part II
programme.desc: The compelling sequel to "The Godfather," contrasting the life of Corleone father and son. Traces the problems of Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) in 1958 and that of a young immigrant Vito Corleone (Robert De Niro) in 1917's Hell's Kitchen. Michael survives many misfortunes and Vito is introduced to a life of crime.

programme.title: The Godfather, Coda: The Death of Michael Corleone
programme.desc: As Michael Corleone (Al Pacino) ages, he finds that being the head of the Corleone crime family isn't getting any easier. He wants his family out of the Mafia, but the mob kingpin (Eli Wallach) isn't eager to let one of the most powerful and wealthy families go legit. Making matters even worse is Michael's nephew, Vincent (Andy Garcia). Not only does Vincent want a piece of the Corleone family's c

programme.title: The Dictator
programme.desc: Gen. Aladeen (Sacha Baron Cohen) has ruled the oil-rich North African country of Wadiya since the age of six, when 97 stray bullets and a hand grenade killed his father in a hunting accident. After an assassination attempt takes the life of yet another body-double, Tamir (Ben Kingsley), Aladeen's uncle and most trusted adviser, convinces Aladeen to go to New York. Unfortunately, Aladeen has a less

programme.title: 21 Jump Street
programme.desc: When cops Schmidt and Jenko join the secret Jump Street unit, they use their youthful appearances to go undercover as high-school students. They trade in their guns and badges for backpacks, and set out to shut down a dangerous drug ring. But, as time goes on, Schmidt and Jenko discover that high school is nothing like it was just a few years earlier -- and, what's more, they must again confront t

programme.title: The Chi
programme.desc: The South Side of Chicago carries daily danger, and the smallest and simplest of decisions can have life or death consequences for the residents. Life continues as the kids prep for school and their parents shuffle off to work. The young adults of the area are trying to scrape a living for themselves, while the elders sit on their front porches and observe the goings on. The South Side has the pot

programme.title: The Wood
programme.desc: Three old friends -- Mike (Omar Epps), Roland (Taye Diggs) and Slim (Richard T. Jones) -- recount memories of their shared childhood in Inglewood, Calif., as they prepare for Roland's wedding to his fiancée, Lisa (LisaRaye). When the groom goes missing without a word, Mike and Slim struggle to find their nervous friend and return him to his impatient bride before the wedding begins. Along the way,

programme.title: Sound of Violence
programme.desc: A young killer experiences intense pleasure whenever she hears the sound of human pain.

programme.title: Seaside
programme.desc: A woman decides to run away to the Oregon coast with her boyfriend when he inherits a family beach house.

programme.title: Attica
programme.desc: During the summer of 1971, tensions between inmates and guards at the Attica Correctional Facility are at an all-time high. On the morning of Sept. 9, it all comes to a head as Attica becomes the stage for one of the largest U.S. prison riots ever.

programme.title: B******': The Sound and Fury of Rick James
programme.desc: A raw and intimate documentary look at the wildly colorful life of legendary funk artist Rick James; original interviews with artists, collaborators and friends.

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: Following the journey of Vanessa, a grief-stricken woman who mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces.

programme.title: The Killing of Kenneth Chamberlain
programme.desc: The events that led to the death of Kenneth Chamberlain Sr., an elderly African American veteran with bipolar disorder, who was killed during a conflict with police officers who were dispatched to check on him.

programme.title: Stand
programme.desc: Basketball star and social justice activist Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf endures a childhood of bullying due to Tourette's syndrome and is the target of hate speech and Islamophobia during his basketball career.

programme.title: Good Burger
programme.desc: Teen misfits (Kel Mitchell, Kenan Thompson) at a modest burger joint face competition from a hamburger emporium across the street.

programme.title: Head of State
programme.desc: A low-level Washington, D.C., public servant, Mays Gilliam (Chris Rock), is thrust into the national spotlight when he's asked by Martin Geller (Dylan Baker), the head of the Democratic Party, to run for president after the party's presidential and vice-presidential nominees are killed in a plane crash. The odds are against Gilliam, mostly because he has a penchant for telling the truth about what

programme.title: Soul Men
programme.desc: Louis (Samuel L. Jackson) and Floyd (Bernie Mac) used to be one of the country's top musical duos, until they broke up and never spoke again. Old animosities resurface 20 years later when the two are thrust together on a cross-country trip to take part in a tribute concert honoring their late band leader. Louis and Floyd have just five short days to bury the hatchet -- hopefully not in someone's h

programme.title: Hotel Artemis
programme.desc: As rioting rocks Los Angeles in the year 2028, disgruntled thieves make their way to Hotel Artemis -- a 13-story, members-only hospital for criminals. It's operated by the Nurse, a no-nonsense, high-tech healer who already has her hands full of a French assassin, an arms dealer and an injured cop. As the violence of the night continues, the Nurse must decide whether to break her own rules and conf

programme.title: Burn Mother...ker, Burn!
programme.desc: A chronicle of how decades of troubled relations between the LAPD and the African-American community served as the prelude to the 1992 Los Angeles uprising.

programme.title: The Boys Are Back
programme.desc: After the untimely passing of his second wife, Joe (Clive Owen) must deal with his grief as he strives to find a way to raise his sons alone. The boys, Artie and Harry, are trying to cope with their own emotional baggage, so the three decide to throw convention to the wind and live by the words "just say yes." When things go wrong, Joe must find a way to behave more like a parent while maintaining

programme.title: Son of Rambow
programme.desc: In the 1980s England, schoolboys Will Proudfoot and Lee Carter meet by chance in a hallway. Though the boys are polar opposites, Lee asks Will to help him make a homemade action movie, inspired by Sylvester Stallone's hit, "Rambo: First Blood." Will, who lives in a strict religious environment, is only too happy to oblige his new friend.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: A big screen spin-off of the "Saturday Night Live" skit. Rob Lowe plays a producer that wants to take the public access "Wayne's World" to the world of commercial television. Wayne (Mike Myers) and Garth (Dana Carvey) battle to save their show and Wayne's girlfriend from Lowe.

programme.title: Wayne's World 2
programme.desc: After Wayne Campbell (Mike Myers) has a dream in which Jim Morrison tells him to put on a rock concert, he and fellow late-night TV star Garth Algar (Dana Carvey) try their hand at promoting. Several musical acts show little interest, leaving the pair uncertain about their ability to put on a successful show. Meanwhile, Cassandra (Tia Carrere), Wayne's rockstar girlfriend, has a new manager (Chris

programme.title: Smoke Signals
programme.desc: Arnold (Gary Farmer) rescued Thomas (Evan Adams) from a fire when he was a child. Thomas thinks of Arnold as a hero, while Arnold's son Victor (Adam Beach) resents his father's alcoholism, violence and abandonment of his family. Uneasy rivals and friends, Thomas and Victor spend their days killing time on a Coeur d'Alene reservation in Idaho and arguing about their cultural identities. When Arnold

programme.title: Star Trek: First Contact
programme.desc: The Enterprise and its crew follow a Borg ship through a time warp to prevent the Borg from taking over the Earth in a past era. Stuck in the past, Geordi La Forge helps a pioneer of space travel in his efforts to create the first warp drive while Capt. Picard and Cmdr. Data battle the Borg Queen as she tries to take over the Enterprise.

programme.title: Charlotte's Web
programme.desc: After learning that a young pig's days are numbered, a literate spider (Julia Roberts) weaves an elaborate plan to save her friend from the butcher's block.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: While shopping at an outdoor market, young reporter Tintin (Jamie Bell), accompanied by his faithful dog, Snowy, buys a model of an old ship called the Unicorn. A shady character named Sakharine (Daniel Craig) and later an American named Barnaby (Joe Starr) try to buy the model from him, but Tintin refuses. The lad discovers that the ship contains a clue about a hidden treasure, but before he can

programme.title: Star Trek V: The Final Frontier
programme.desc: A renegade Vulcan makes Kirk (William Shatner), Spock (Leonard Nimoy), McCoy (DeForest Kelley) and the Enterprise go to a planet at the center of the galaxy.

programme.title: Star Trek VI: The Undiscovered Country
programme.desc: Capt. James Kirk (William Shatner) and the crew of the USS Enterprise are carrying Klingon Chancellor Gorkon (David Warner) to Earth to negotiate a peace treaty with the United Federation of Planets. The ship appears to fire on a Klingon vessel, and Gorkon is killed in the subsequent confusion. Kirk and the ship's doctor, Leonard McCoy (DeForest Kelley), are arrested for murder, leaving Spock (Leo

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee
programme.desc: A New York reporter heads to Australia to interview the living legend Mike Dundee (Paul Hogan). When she finally locates him, she is so taken with him that she brings him back with her to New York. In New York, Mike Dundee is amazed by the wonders of the city and the interesting people there.

programme.title: Indiana Jones and the Temple of Doom
programme.desc: The second of the Lucas/Spielberg Indiana Jones epics is set a year or so before the events in Raiders of the Lost Ark. Indy needs to retrieve a precious gem and several kidnapped young boys on behalf of a remote East Indian village. This time he teams up with a night club singer and a 12-year old boy.

programme.title: Rango
programme.desc: A chameleon who has lived as a sheltered family pet finds himself in the grip of an identity crisis. Rango wonders how to stand out when it is his nature to blend in. When he accidentally winds up in a frontier town called Dirt, he takes the first step on a transformational journey as the town's new sheriff. Though at first Rango only role-plays, a series of thrilling situations and outrageous enc

programme.title: The Adventures of Sharkboy and Lavagirl
programme.desc: Bullied by classmates, young Max escapes into a fantasy, conjuring up the action-packed lives of Lavagirl and Sharkboy. But one day, Lavagirl and Sharkboy suddenly come to life -- and their world, Planet Drool, needs a hero named Max. As Max escapes to Planet Drool, he battles aliens and tries to save his new friends' planet from destruction. He also battles his bullies, who have become villains l

programme.title: Get Rich or Die Tryin'
programme.desc: After losing his mother to murder as a boy, Marcus (Curtis "50 Cent" Jackson) has little support in his life. He starts working for drug dealer Levar (Bill Duke) and his assistant (Adewale Akinnuoye-Agbaje). Although Marcus makes good money selling, his dream is to become a rapper. When he reunites with an old love (Joy Bryant) and is later shot numerous times during a robbery, Marcus decides it's

programme.title: Paid in Full
programme.desc: In the late 1980s, Ace (Wood Harris) is a young man employed by a Harlem dry cleaning shop, working hard to stay out of the drug business. While making deliveries, he meets Lulu (Esai Morales), a drug dealer who convinces Ace to join him. Ace recruits his friends Mitch (Mekhi Phifer) and Rico (Cam'ron), and the trio become major players in the Harlem drug underworld, a violent business that will t

programme.title: Gasoline Alley
programme.desc: Set in the underbelly of Los Angeles, a man is drawn into a high-profile triple murder. The two police detectives on his tail soon join him in attempting to uncover an explosive conspiracy.

programme.title: Grudge Match
programme.desc: Pittsburgh boxers Billy "The Kid" McDonnen (Robert De Niro) and Henry "Razor" Sharp (Sylvester Stallone) shared a fierce rivalry back in the 1980s. Each had scored a victory in two matches, but on the eve of their decisive third bout, Henry suddenly announced his retirement, effectively ending both boxers' careers. Thirty years later, boxing promoter Dante Slate Jr. (Kevin Hart) makes Billy and He

programme.title: Harlem Nights
programme.desc: In the waning days of Prohibition, Sugar Ray (Richard Pryor) and his adopted son, Quick (Eddie Murphy), run a speakeasy called Club Sugar Ray. When gangster Bugsy Calhoun (Michael Lerner) learns that Sugar Ray's place is pulling in more money than his own establishment, the Petty Pat Club, he pays corrupt cop Phil Canton (Danny Aiello) to close Club Sugar Ray down. Quick doesn't exactly help the s

programme.title: Ali
programme.desc: With wit and athletic genius, with defiant rage and inner grace, Muhammad Ali forever changed the American landscape. Fighting all comers, Ali took on the law, conventions, the status quo and the war -- as well as the fists in front of him. Ali both ignited and mirrored the conflicts of his time and ours to become one of the most admired fighters in the world. Forget, now, what you thought you kne

programme.title: Dreamland
programme.desc: A teen bounty hunter is torn between helping or capturing a seductive fugitive bank robber hiding in his small town during the Great Depression.

programme.title: Kickback
programme.desc: A documentary following the decades-long crusade of investigative journalist Andrew Jennings to expose corruption inside FIFA, football's sole governing body and the largest sports organization in the world.

programme.title: Masterminds
programme.desc: An armored-car driver (Zach Galifianakis) helps a flirty co-worker (Kristen Wiig) and her friends pull off a heist, then finds himself holding the bag after they double-cross him.

programme.title: Scream
programme.desc: The sleepy little town of Woodsboro just woke up screaming. There's a killer in their midst who's seen a few too many scary movies. Suddenly nobody is safe, as the psychopath stalks victims, taunts them with trivia questions, then rips them to bloody shreds. It could be anybody...

programme.title: Scream 2
programme.desc: Sydney (Neve Campbell) and tabloid reporter Gale Weathers (Courteney Cox) survived the events of the first Scream, but their nightmare isn't over. When two college students are murdered at a sneak preview of Stab, a movie based on the events from the first film, it's clear a copycat killer is on the loose. Sydney and Gail, as well as fellow survivors Deputy Dewey (David Arquette) and Randy (Jamie

programme.title: Scream 3
programme.desc: In the final installment to this trilogy, a murder spree begins to happen again; this time targeted toward the original Woodsboro survivors and those associated with the movie-inside-a-movie, Stab 3. Sydney must face the demons of her past to stop the killer(s).

programme.title: Fatman
programme.desc: To save his declining business, Kris Kringle, also known as Santa Claus, is forced into a partnership with the U.S. military. Making matters worse, Kris gets locked into a deadly battle of wits against a highly skilled assassin, hired by a precocious 12-year-old, after receiving a lump of coal in his stocking.

programme.title: Jackie Chan's First Strike
programme.desc: This fourth instalment of Jackie Chan's Police Story film franchise has our hero trying to locate a missing nuclear warhead.

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes
programme.desc: Gunner is a special forces soldier who returns to the field of battle to save his kidnapped niece in South America.

programme.title: Sky Cinema Preview
programme.desc: Previews of the great films now playing on Sky Cinema, plus other highlights showing on Sky.

programme.title: Reckless
programme.desc: A former convict on parole must outwit the police to get his share of an old heist. Offbeat action comedy with Scott Adkins and Vinnie Jones.

programme.title: Safe House
programme.desc: Six federal agents in hiding after the LA terror attack grow suspicious of each other as they realise the perpetrator could be among them.

programme.title: Red Right Hand
programme.desc: When an honest man is forced back into the services of his town's kingpin, he learns to stop at nothing to protect his family. Action thriller starring Orlando Bloom.

programme.title: Bullet Train
programme.desc: Five assassins, all on a fast-moving train, find out their missions have something in common. Action thriller with Brad Pitt and Joey King.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: A gang of double-crossed thieves plan to cause a monumental traffic jam in a bid to reclaim their loot. Starring Mark Wahlberg and Ed Norton.(106mins).

programme.title: The Running Man
programme.desc: Desperate to save his sick daughter, a man enters a deadly televised competition. Edgar Wright directs.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: Transformers
programme.desc: Robotic carnage as the heroic Autobots take on the evil Decepticons. Will mankind survive? Adrenaline-charged action from director Michael Bay.

programme.title: Morbius
programme.desc: A biochemist with a rare blood disease inadvertently infects himself with a form of vampirism. Marvel action with Jared Leto.

programme.title: 300: Rise Of An Empire
programme.desc: Greek general Thermistocles leads the charge against an invading Persian army in this action extravaganza. Strong language/violence/sex/mature themes/flashing images.

programme.title: Miss Congeniality 2: Armed and Fabulous
programme.desc: FBI agent Gracie Hart is taken off active duty and made the face of the bureau's publicity campaign, but would rather catch crooks than be the focus of media attention - so when her friends are kidnapped, she disobeys orders to run her own undercover investigation with the help of a short-tempered colleague. Comedy sequel, starring Sandra Bullock, Regina King, William Shatner and Heather Burns.

programme.title: Blades of Glory
programme.desc: A bad-boy figure skater and his effeminate arch-enemy are banned from the sport after their intense rivalry results in a brawl. However, the pair find a loophole in the regulations allowing them to enter the world championships as the first ever same-sex pair - if they can put aside their differences long enough to compete. Comedy, starring Will Ferrell, Jon Heder, Will Arnett and Amy Poehler.

programme.title: Honey Don't
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Seven Psychopaths
programme.desc: A writer struggling to complete the script for a movie about psychopathic killers turns to his criminal friends for advice. He ends up getting more than he bargained for when the small-time crooks kidnap a dog that belongs to a gangster, putting all their lives in danger. Comedy thriller, starring Colin Farrell, Sam Rockwell, Christopher Walken and Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: Spinal Tap II: The End Continues
programme.desc: Nigel Tufnel, David St Hubbins and Derek Smalls reunite after a 15-year break for one final concert. Their progress is charted once more by documentary maker Marti DiBergi, who offers perhaps too much perspective on their new direction. Comedy sequel, written by and starring Michael McKean, Harry Shearer, Christopher Guest and director Rob Reiner, in his final film. Kerry Godliman and Chris Addiso

programme.title: Billy Madison
programme.desc: A lazy twentysomething lives off his wealthy hotel magnate father. When the old man decides to retire, he begins to question whether his layabout son is suitable to take over the family empire and issues a challenge - he must retake 12 years of school in 24 weeks, or lose everything. Comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Bridgette Wilson, Darren McGavin and Bradley Whitford.

programme.title: Bridget Jones: The Edge of Reason
programme.desc: The disaster-prone journalist seems to have finally found the perfect boyfriend. However, when the couple start to squabble over their personal habits, she decides to decamp for a while to Thailand and write a travelogue. Unfortunately, she has reckoned without the reappearance of a duplicitous old flame - and a spell behind bars in a Thai prison. Romantic comedy sequel, with Renee Zellweger, Coli

programme.title: Honey Don't
programme.desc: California private detective Honey O'Donahue delves into a series of unusual deaths connected to a mysterious church. Co-writer/director Ethan Coen's comedy mystery, starring Margaret Qualley, Aubrey Plaza and Chris Evans.

programme.title: Caddyshack
programme.desc: A host of weird and wacky characters cause mayhem at an exclusive golf club, including a laid-back professional player, an obnoxious millionaire, the snobbish club president, a motley collection of teenage caddies and a psychotic groundskeeper engaging in a fight to the death with a canny gopher. Comedy, starring Chevy Chase, Bill Murray, Michael O'Keefe and Rodney Dangerfield.

programme.title: Mean Machine
programme.desc: A disgraced soccer star jailed for assaulting two policemen is persuaded by the prison authorities to form a football team of inmates to take on the guards. Unfortunately, whipping his fellow prisoners into shape proves a tricky proposition. Comedy drama, starring Vinnie Jones, Jason Statham, David Hemmings and Jason Flemyng.

programme.title: Mean Girls
programme.desc: A teenager is surprised when she is befriended by the girls in the most popular clique at her new school. However, a dating mishap leads to trouble and her supposed friends start to turn on her. Urged on by other pals outside their circle, the newcomer resolves to bring down the self-appointed queen of campus - only to end up adopting some of her rival's crueller characteristics. Comedy, with Lind

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips.

programme.title: Just Go with It
programme.desc: A plastic surgeon pretends to be unhappily married to seduce women. When his girlfriend finds his prop wedding ring, he claims he is getting a divorce and has to persuade his assistant to pose as his soon-to-be ex-wife, but is forced to come up with yet more lies to maintain the illusion. Romantic comedy, starring Adam Sandler, Jennifer Aniston and Nicole Kidman.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: Ralph Fiennes and Julianne Moore star in this intelligent tale of romance amid the rubble of wartime London, based on Graham Greene's book. Contains sex and mature themes.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence and stand up for himself, his family and his future in this heartwarming story of identity. Starring Minnie Driver.

programme.title: Aisha
programme.desc: A young Nigerian woman seeking asylum in Ireland forms a tender friendship with an employee at her residence. Sky Original film starring Letitia Wright and Josh O'Connor.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: The life and work of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart seen through the eyes of his contemporary and rival, Antonio Salieri.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: A promising undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies professional orders when he falls in love with a target. Language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Uproar
programme.desc: A 17-year-old student is forced to get off the fence and stand up for himself, his family and his future in this heartwarming story of identity. Starring Minnie Driver.

programme.title: The Post
programme.desc: Publisher Katharine and her editor-in-chief Ben put their careers and freedom at risk to uncover a scandalous decades-long secret about the Vietnam War.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: In World War II London, a writer falls in love with the wife of a British civil servant - but both men suspect her of infidelity with yet another man. Romantic drama.

programme.title: A Good Person
programme.desc: Drama about how one split second can change the trajectory of our lives. Sky Original film written and directed by Zach Braff, starring Morgan Freeman and Florence Pugh.

programme.title: Lost In Translation
programme.desc: Bored in a Tokyo hotel, Bill Murray and Scarlett Johansson share an unlikely brief encounter. Oscar-winning romance. Contains sexual scenes.

programme.title: Amadeus
programme.desc: The life and work of Wolfgang Amadeus Mozart seen through the eyes of his contemporary and rival, Antonio Salieri.

programme.title: Plainclothes
programme.desc: A promising undercover agent assigned to lure and arrest gay men defies professional orders when he falls in love with a target. Language/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Harriet The Spy
programme.desc: Wannabe writer Harriet loses her book of secrets. What will her friends think when they find out what she's written? Adventure with Rosie O'Donnell.

programme.title: Mousehunt
programme.desc: Lee Evans and Nathan Lane are the bumbling brothers whose plans to renovate a valuable building are thwarted by a super smart rodent. Comedy with Christopher Walken.

programme.title: Across the Desert
programme.desc: Tafiti, a young meerkat, initially rejects friendship with Bristles, a bush pig. When his grandpa is bitten by a snake, Tafiti sets off to find the flower for the cure.

programme.title: Batteries Not Included
programme.desc: Aliens help a feisty old New York couple in their battle against the ruthless land developer who's out to evict them and their tenants. Sci-fi comedy with Hume Cronyn.

programme.title: The Bad Guys 2
programme.desc: Struggling to adjust to their new lives, the Bad Guys are offered one last job by a group of all-female criminals.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse: The Movie
programme.desc: Gabby and Grandma Gigi's road trip takes an unexpected turn when Gabby's prized dollhouse ends up with eccentric cat lady Vera.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The ninja turtles emerge from the sewers below to protect New York from the villainous Shredder. Hit action fun with Megan Fox.

programme.title: Jumanji: The Next Level
programme.desc: The gang is back as Dwayne Johnson, Kevin Hart and Jack Black return to Jumanji.

programme.title: Sonic The Hedgehog 3
programme.desc: Sonic, Knuckles and Tails reunite to battle Shadow, a mysterious new enemy with powers unlike anything they've faced before.

programme.title: Peter Rabbit 2
programme.desc: Bored of life in the garden, Peter goes to the big city, where he meets shady characters and ends up creating chaos for the whole family.

programme.title: The Lego Movie
programme.desc: An ordinary Lego construction worker becomes responsible for stopping a dastardly tyrant. Animated hit with an all-star voice cast. Flashing images.

programme.title: Lego Movie 2: The Second Part
programme.desc: The heroes of Bricksburg return in an action-packed comedy sequel. With Chris Pratt and Elizabeth Banks.

programme.title: Pets On A Train
programme.desc: When a crew of animal bandits embark on a routine swindle, they find themselves caught up in a train heist.

programme.title: The Ant Bully
programme.desc: Shrunk by the ants he tormented, Lucas must learn to work with the insects, instead of against them. Bugs bite back in this animation from the director of Jimmy Neutron.

programme.title: Love Story
programme.desc: Oscar-winner with Ryan O'Neal and Ali MacGraw as the young lovers who defy his parents to stay together, only to face tragedy. Heartrending drama. Strong language.

programme.title: The End Of The Affair
programme.desc: In World War II London, a writer falls in love with the wife of a British civil servant - but both men suspect her of infidelity with yet another man. Romantic drama.

programme.title: The Cinema List: British Women...
programme.desc: The Cinema List spotlights trailblazing British women directors, from Mamma Mia! to Promising Young Woman, celebrating female filmmaking talent.

programme.title: Fords On Water
programme.desc: Two unemployed young men - one white and one black - decide to take off to the north in a stolen car in a bid to make something out of life. Comedy.

programme.title: Smokey And The Bandit
programme.desc: Truck driver Bandit agrees to deliver a stash of illegal liquor to Georgia, only to find himself in a madcap race. Starring the late Burt Reynolds. Strong language/violence.

programme.title: The Natural
programme.desc: A struggling baseball team soars to the top of the league when they are joined by a player with a mysterious past.

programme.title: See No Evil, Hear No Evil
programme.desc: Comedy starring Gene Wilder as a deaf news-stand owner, who is framed for murder with his blind assistant. Language/mature themes/flashing images/discriminatory content.

programme.title: Singin' In The Rain
programme.desc: In one of the most acclaimed musicals of all time, silent movie actors Gene Kelly and Jean Hagen make a toe-tapping transition into the new-fangled era of the talkies.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Romcom royalty Tom Hanks and Meg Ryan are rival booksellers unaware that they are also anonymous e-mail amours. Novel romance from the director of Sleepless in Seattle.

programme.title: Dumb & Dumber
programme.desc: Calamity follows dim-witted pals Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels as they embark on a cross-country road trip to Colorado. Comedy. Strong language/violence/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: Pet Detective
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as the animal-loving private eye on the trail of a kidnapped dolphin. Riotous comedy with Courteney Cox and Sean Young. Discriminatory content.

programme.title: Ace Ventura: When Nature Calls
programme.desc: Pet detective Jim Carrey pursues a kidnapped bat through the African jungle. Madcap comedy sequel of rhinos and witch doctors, from the writer of Bruce Almighty.

programme.title: The Wedding Singer
programme.desc: Sunny waitress Drew Barrymore helps dumped and depressed wedding singer Adam Sandler get his groove back in this loveable 80s-set comedy. Strong language.

programme.title: National Lampoon's Vacation
programme.desc: Hilarious cross-country comedy starring Chevy Chase as accident-prone dad Clark Griswold whose well-planned family holiday quickly descends into chaos.

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: The friends from East Great Falls High reunite to celebrate Jim and Michelle's forthcoming wedding. Though reluctant to invite Stifler to their big day, the happy couple relent - but regret their decision when he plans a bachelor party on the same evening Jim is due to meet the in-laws. The third instalment in the comedy series, with Jason Biggs, Alyson Hannigan, Seann William Scott, Eddie Kaye Th

programme.title: American Reunion
programme.desc: Jim Levenstein and his old friends return to their home town for a high-school reunion. Struck by how much their lives have changed, they set out to relive the sexual misadventures of their adolescence, but only end up making bigger fools of themselves than they did as teenagers. Comedy sequel to the American Pie movies, starring Jason Biggs and Alyson Hannigan.

programme.title: American Pie
programme.desc: Four teenage lads make a solemn pact to lose their virginity before the high-school prom. Though their antics cause them huge embarrassment and public humiliation, the friends also learn about love and affection in their relations with the opposite sex. Coming-of-age comedy, starring Jason Biggs, Shannon Elizabeth, Chris Klein, Alyson Hannigan, Mena Suvari, Seann William Scott and Eugene Levy.

programme.title: American Pie 2
programme.desc: The teenagers reunite after their first year at college to spend the summer at a lake house. Jim is concerned by his lack of sexual experience, and goes in search of an old flame, Oz struggles to keep a long-term relationship going, and Finch tries to master the art of tantric sex. Comedy sequel, starring Jason Biggs, Chris Klein, Seann William Scott, Alyson Hannigan and Eugene Levy.

programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: Him
programme.desc: A young athlete descends into a world of terror when he's invited to train with a legendary champion whose charisma curdles into something darker.

programme.title: The Bride!
programme.desc: Tasked by Frankenstein to create a companion, Dr Euphronius gives life to a murdered woman, sparking romance, police interest and radical change.

programme.title: The Cinema List: Race Against Time
programme.desc: This edition of the Cinema List is about the race against time. From a deadly threat in Fuze to The Desperate Hour, where Naomi Watts faces every parent's nightmare - the clock is ticking.

programme.title: The Internship
programme.desc: A CIA-trained assassin recruits other graduates from her secret childhood programme, The Internship, to violently destroy the organisation.

programme.title: They Will Kill You
programme.desc: A woman takes a job as a housekeeper in a NYC high-rise, unaware of the building's history of disappearances.

programme.title: No Ordinary Heist
programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: Dead Man's Wire
programme.desc: After taking a mortgage company president hostage with a wired shotgun, a desperate man sparks a tense standoff that grips the nation.

programme.title: Fuze
programme.desc: An unexploded WWII bomb is discovered on a busy construction site in the centre of London. Chaos ensues as the military and police begin a mass evacuation.

programme.title: The Choral
programme.desc: A choral society's male members enlist in the First World War, leaving the demanding Dr Guthrie to recruit teenagers and experience the joy of singing.

programme.title: No Ordinary Heist
programme.desc: Inspired by the 2004 Northern Bank robbery, two feuding bank employees are forced to execute Ireland's biggest heist after criminals kidnap their families.

programme.title: Black Phone 2

programme.title: Fuze

programme.title: Xeno
programme.desc: A young girl and a terrifying alien form a powerful bond after a chance encounter in the desert, sending them on an adventure that questions the nature of good and evil.

programme.title: After Earth
programme.desc: In the distant future, father and son Will and Jaden Smith crash land on an abandoned Earth, which has evolved to destroy human life. Sci-fi epic. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: We Bury the Dead
programme.desc: After a catastrophic military disaster, the dead don't just rise, they hunt. Daisy Ridley searches for her husband, but what she finds is far more terrifying.

programme.title: Man Finds Tape
programme.desc: After finding mysterious video clips, siblings investigate the strange recordings and uncover a disturbing secret. Found-footage horror. Language/violence.

programme.title: Annabelle
programme.desc: In this creepy prequel to hit horror The Conjuring, a married couple are tormented by a doll that has been possessed by an evil spirit.

programme.title: Annabelle: Creation
programme.desc: Young orphan Linda finds herself drawn to a creepy porcelain doll that seems to have evil in its cold, dead eyes... Horror.

programme.title: Zombieland: Double Tap
programme.desc: Hit zombie comedy sequel. The group move into the American heartland, and have to face up to new, evolved zombies. With Woody Harrelson.

programme.title: 28 Years Later
programme.desc: Three decades since the rage virus took hold, one survivor leaves the safety of a fortified island on a mission into the mainland.

programme.title: Until Dawn
programme.desc: After her sister disappeared, Clover and her friends head to where she vanished to search for answers. They soon encounter a masked killer who murders them one by one.

programme.title: Edge Of Tomorrow: Live
programme.desc: Die. Repeat: Army officer Tom Cruise gets stuck in a time-loop that sees him doing battle with aliens time and again.

programme.title: Van Helsing
programme.desc: Fearless slayer Hugh Jackman and feisty vamp Kate Beckinsale do battle with Dracula, Frankenstein and the Wolfman. Action. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Smile 2
programme.desc: Would it kill you to smile? Pop star Skye Riley faces increasingly terrifying events, leading her down a dark path into her past. Horror sequel.

programme.title: The Exorcist
programme.desc: William Friedkin's Oscar-winning horror about a priest battling to save the soul of a girl. Language/violence/mature themes/sex/flashing images.

programme.title: Boyz N The Hood
programme.desc: Ice Cube and Cuba Gooding Jr star as friends fighting to survive on the mean streets of inner city LA. Hard-hitting, Oscar-nominated drama.

programme.title: The Desperate Hour
programme.desc: A mother desperately races against time to save her child when a shooting takes place at his school. Tense Sky Original film starring Naomi Watts.

programme.title: Days Of Thunder
programme.desc: Maverick racer Tom Cruise risks all to become a NASCAR champ, wooing Nicole Kidman between laps. Contains strong language, sexual scenes and flashing images.

programme.title: Justice League
programme.desc: When a terrifying new villain emerges Batman and Wonder Woman must assemble a team capable of fighting back. DC action.

programme.title: Superman
programme.desc: Balancing alien heritage with a human upbringing, Superman is drawn into a conflict that challenges his belief in truth and justice.

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Michael Keaton's Bruce Wayne takes on Jack Nicholson's villainous Joker. Gothic Gotham fantasy directed by Tim Burton. Violence/flashing images.

programme.title: Batman Returns
programme.desc: Blockbuster action as Gotham braces itself for a showdown between the caped crusader, Catwoman and the Penguin.

programme.title: Superman

programme.title: Wonder Woman
programme.desc: Gal Gadot stars as an Amazon warrior princess who leaves her hidden island home to fight in the Great War.

programme.title: Vanilla Sky

programme.title: Jericho Ridge
programme.desc: Trapped and without backup, a small town cop fights for her life when her remote sheriff's office is targeted by murderous attackers. Action-packed thriller.

programme.title: Parallel
programme.desc: Grief-stricken after the loss of her child, Vanessa mysteriously finds herself navigating between parallel spaces. Thrilling sci-fi drama.

programme.title: Promising Young Woman
programme.desc: In this Oscar and BAFTA-winning thriller with Carey Mulligan, a woman pursues her own form of justice after her friend is sexually assaulted.

programme.title: Ocean's 8

programme.title: Trap

programme.title: Speak No Evil
programme.desc: A dream holiday turns into a nightmare when an American family stay at a British couple's idyllic estate. Horror with James McAvoy.

programme.title: No Country For Old Men
programme.desc: After stealing $2million in drug money, Josh Brolin is hunted by ruthless psychotic Javier Bardem. Oscar-winning crime thriller. Strong bloody violence/strong language.

programme.title: Cellular
programme.desc: Piecing together a broken mobile phone, a kidnapped Kim Basinger makes a call that could save her life. Suspenseful thriller starring Jason Statham and Chris Evans.

programme.title: The Equalizer
programme.desc: Retired tough guy Denzel Washington returns to his old ways to protect a girl from Russian gangsters. Slick thriller with Chloe Grace Moretz.

programme.title: The Equalizer 2
programme.desc: Denzel Washington returns as retired CIA agent Robert McCall, who is drawn back into action on a quest for revenge in this fast-paced thriller.

programme.title: Caught Stealing
programme.desc: When his neighbour asks him to take care of his cat, a former baseball-prodigy-turned bartender finds himself caught up with gangsters.

programme.title: The Brothers Bloom
programme.desc: Twenty-five years of swindling people are too much for Bloom, and he wants out of the business. The con game fails to play out as planned when Bloom falls in love with the irresistible woman.

Charlotte's band comes together and seems to have a real shot at victory, while Will and dynamic guitarist Sa5m begin to make some beautiful music of their own.
